meaning: 宏基电脑公司,主要生产个人电脑产品
examples: Eight photos and nine short videos come loaded on the Acer Aspire.
Acer did not give a release date or a price range for the smartphone.
The real threat may come when Acer incorporates its new technology into all its PCs.
He believes Acer can shake up the market regardless, given its corporate heft and strong brand.
